command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import json
for url in [
    'https://api.github.com/repos/geoffder/ds-circuit-ei-microarchitecture/readme',
    'https://api.github.com/repos/geoffder/ds-circuit-ei-microarchitecture',
]:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'neuron-channels-arf', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3.raw'})
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
        print('===', url)
        try:
            print(data.decode('utf-8')[:3000])
        except Exception:
            print(data[:3000])
        print('---')
    except Exception as e:
        print('err', url, repr(e))
